summary.contentAssessment: The source is a Next.js educational dashboard with its curriculum embedded in a single large public/script.js payload rather than separate lecture, algorithm, or tutorial data files.
notes: The app content is breast-pathology / HER2 focused.
Most educational material is mixed into one script: guidelines, slide box, case simulation, scenarios, biomarkers, reports, discussion, progress, and images.
The only standalone local asset outside the script is a small SVG logo.

tutorials.reason: Contains the main educational curriculum and tutorial-like views, including guidelines, cases, scenarios, flashcards, and quiz content.

images.reason: Contains embedded image-backed educational content and image library references.
Only standalone local image asset found; likely branding, not core curriculum.

dependencies.role: App entry that consumes the public content payload.
Data access layer used by the app shell.

recommendation: Migrate public/script.js first and normalize it into structured tutorial/content records. Do not expect separate lecture or algorithm source files in this project. Treat images as mostly embedded/remote references and extract them only after the text curriculum is staged.
